name: Lifecycle ops on real S3: tenant deletion + ADD COLUMN
claim: Basin makes tenant teardown a list+delete and treats schema evolution as a catalog operation; PG must DROP SCHEMA CASCADE and (in the general case) rewrite the heap.

metrics.label: Tenant deletion (1 tenant, 100K rows in 100 files; basin on S3)
ADD COLUMN on 100K rows (Basin: catalog-only simulation; engine doesn't parse ALTER yet)

note: Basin storage on real S3 — tenant deletion is parallel DELETE round-trips, not unlinked inodes.
